text: I feel a contemplative sense of anticipation. The sleek glass walls and digital screens evoke a liminal space between knowledge and inquiry. In the first room, the emptiness and silence amplify my awareness—I am poised on the edge of discovery, aware of my own presence as both observer and participant. The second scene, blooming with color and text, invites me to reflect on the creative process: "Confusion is indeed the rhythm," the screen proclaims, and I feel an almost existential comfort in the uncertainty and intellectual play unfolding around me. Here, I am both the seeker and the sought, immersed in the experimental dance of meaning-making.
